summary: Frontend testing for P0 Bug Fix: Pricing Page Free plan button. All tests PASSED. The fix correctly shows 'Start Free Demo' button for Free plan regardless of auth state (not logged in, logged in as FREE user, logged in as PRO user). Demo mode navigation works correctly. Pro/Elite plan buttons show correct states based on user tier.
critical_code_review_comments: PricingPage.jsx fix on lines 314-319 correctly separates Free plan rendering from other plans, bypassing auth-state-dependent button text logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. Free plan always shows 'Start Free Demo' linking to /demo. Demo mode redirects to /dashboard?demo=true with demo banner visible. Pro/Elite plans show correct 'Current Plan' (disabled) or 'Upgrade to X' based on user tier.

tests_executed.test: Pricing page Free plan shows 'Start Free Demo' when NOT logged in
Pricing page Free plan shows 'Start Free Demo' when logged in as FREE tier user
Demo mode banner appears at top of dashboard when in demo mode
Pricing page billing toggle (Monthly/Yearly) works correctly
Pricing page Pro plan shows 'Current Plan' (disabled) for Pro users
Pricing page Elite plan shows 'Upgrade to Elite' for free/pro users
Pricing page Free plan shows 'Start Free Demo' for PRO user (not 'Current Plan')
